title: Combine two Adler-32 checksums (RFC 1950 §A.2)
signature: pub fn adler32_combine(adler1: u32, adler2: u32, len2: u64) -> u32
notes: Faithful port of zlib's adler32_combine_. Computes the Adler-32 that would result from concatenating two byte sequences given their individual Adler-32 values and the length of the second sequence. Uses BASE = 65521.
